title: Trajectory
description: Unified JSONL schema for recording single-agent ReAct episodes.

step_id.description: Monotonically increasing ID for structural nodes within the episode.

call_id.description: Used to link ACT_TOOL and OBS_TOOL pairs.

payload.description: Content of the node depending on type (e.g. tool_name/args for ACT_TOOL, raw_text for THOUGHT/OBS_TOOL).

ref_ids.description: Explicit references (citations) to previous step_ids used in this step (e.g. [[obs:12]] -> [12]).

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp or local offset for ordering and latency metrics.
